I need the actual content of the CBSE Class 10 Science Previous Year Question Papers to perform the analysis. The provided text only contains the cover pages and general instructions for the papers.

**To help me analyze, please provide the actual question papers in a text format.**

Once you provide the question papers, I will be able to:

1.  **Topic-wise question frequency table:** I will go through each question, identify the topic it belongs to (e.g., Light, Electricity, Chemical Reactions, Reproduction, Heredity, etc.), and count how many questions fall under each topic across all the papers.
2.  **Question type analysis (MCQ / short / long):** I will categorize each question as Multiple Choice Question (MCQ), Short Answer Question (SAQ - typically 2-3 marks), or Long Answer Question (LAQ - typically 5 marks or case-based questions). I will then present the count for each type.
3.  **High-weightage topics:** Based on the frequency table, I will identify the topics that appear most often in the question papers.
4.  **Trends across years:** If you provide papers from different years, I can look for any shifts in topic emphasis or question patterns over time.
5.  **Student strategy for maximum marks:** This will be a general strategy based on the analysis, advising students on how to approach different question types and focus on high-weightage areas.
6.  **List of frequently repeated questions:** I will compare questions across the papers and identify any that are identical or very similar in their core concept.

**Please share the full content of the question papers.** You can do this by pasting the text directly or by describing the questions if copy-pasting is not feasible.
